notes.subject: Polyplex Corporation Ltd - 524051 - Board Meeting Outcome for Board Approval For Acquisition Of 51% Of The Share Capital Of Technova Printrite Products Private Limited By Polyplex Corporation Limited
notes.ai_summary: Polyplex Corporation Limited has executed a Share Purchase Agreement (SPA) dated March 25, 2026, for the acquisition of 51% of the equity share capital of TechNova Printrite Products Private Limited. The SPA was entered into with the Sellers, whose details are provided in Annexure 1. Concurrently, the company also executed a Shareholder’s and Rights Agreement. This acquisition marks a significant development for Polyplex Corporation Limited, as approved by its Board of Directors. The company will also be filing necessary disclosures under Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirement) Regulations, 2015.

notes.subject: Saatvik Green Energy Ltd - 544526 - Allocation Of Land By Saatvik Solar Industries Private Limited , Material Subsidiary Of The Company
notes.ai_summary: Saatvik Green Energy Ltd's material subsidiary, Saatvik Solar Industries Private Limited, has entered into a lease deed with M P Industrial Development Corporation Limited. This lease is for 185 acres of land, approximately 748,668 square meters, located in the Manufacturing Zone for Power and Renewable Energy Equipment in Narmadapuram. The lease agreement has a tenor of 99 years. This land acquisition by the subsidiary is a significant development for Saatvik Green Energy Ltd's operational expansion.

notes.subject: Gujarat Ambuja Exports Ltd - 524226 - Commencement Of Commercial Production Of New Maltodextrin Facility At Hubli, Karnataka
notes.ai_summary: Gujarat Ambuja Exports Ltd. has successfully commenced commercial production at its new Maltodextrin facility in Hubli, Karnataka, effective March 28, 2026. This expansion increases the company's total installed capacity for Maltodextrin production at Hubli from 7,000 MTPA to 23,000 MTPA. This development is in line with the company's growth strategy and is expected to enhance its market presence in the Maltodextrin segment.

notes.subject: Bagging/Receiving of orders/contracts
notes.ai_summary: Hilton Metal Forging Limited has secured a contract for the supply of 360,000 standard 155mm M107 empty bomb artillery shells. The order, valued at approximately Rs. 720.00 Crores, will be executed over 24 months with a supply rate of 15,000 units per month. The contract is subject to the approval of a sample batch of 10 pieces and receipt of advance payments based on prototype approval. This order has been awarded by a domestic entity.

notes.subject: Press Release
notes.ai_summary: Hilton Metal Forging Limited has issued a press release on March 26, 2026, announcing an Interim Sales Agreement for the supply of 360,000 standard 155mm M107 empty bomb artillery shells. The approximate value of this order is Rs. 720.00 Crores. The agreement includes a structured delivery schedule of 15,000 units per month over a 24-month period. The payment terms involve a rolling advance equivalent to 50% of three months' supply, with monthly invoicing payable prior to dispatch. Supplies are expected to commence upon completion of requisite formalities and receipt of advance payments.

notes.subject: Agreements
notes.ai_summary: Summary: Mukand Limited has executed two Conveyance Deeds for the sale of land parcels at Dighe. The first deed involves the sale of a 50% undivided share in land admeasuring approximately 9,871 sq. mtrs (2.44 acres) for a consideration of Rs. 43,98,02,405. The second deed is for the sale of a portion of land admeasuring approximately 57,386 sq. mtrs (14.18 acres) for a consideration of Rs. 511,36,66,460. The total consideration for both transactions is Rs. 555,34,68,865. After adjusting Rs. 110,00,00,000 paid earlier, the Company has received the balance consideration of Rs. 445,34,68,865. This follows an earlier intimation dated July 23, 2025.

notes.subject: Tamilnadu Petroproducts Ltd - 500777 - Announcement Under Regulation 30 LODR - Update
notes.ai_summary: Tamilnadu Petroproducts Ltd has successfully completed the expansion activities at its Heavy Chemicals Division (HCD) plant. Operations at the expanded facility are scheduled to commence on March 28, 2026. Furthermore, the Tamil Nadu Pollution Control Board has granted the company its Consent to Operate for the enhanced capacity of 250 TPD of Caustic Soda production. This approval allows the company to operate and discharge emissions in compliance with the Air (Prevention and Control of Pollution) Act, 1981, and discharge sewage and trade effluent under the Water (Prevention and Control of Pollution) Act, 1974.

notes.subject: Unichem Laboratories Ltd - 506690 - Announcement Under Reg. 30 - Product Recall
notes.ai_summary: Unichem Laboratories Ltd announced a voluntary product recall by its wholly-owned subsidiary, Unichem Pharmaceuticals (USA), Inc., for its Buspirone Hydrochloride Tablets, USP, 5 mg strength in 500 count bottles. The recall is due to an out-of-specification (OOS) assay result identified at the 12-month long-term stability time point. The company has not received any reports of adverse events related to this recall to date. Unichem Laboratories Ltd emphasizes its highest priority on patient safety and product quality. This disclosure is made under Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015. The recall is effective from the date of the announcement.

notes.subject: Zim Laboratories Ltd - 541400 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Updates on Acquisition
notes.ai_summary: Zim Laboratories Ltd has made a further investment of Rs. 89,45,100 in the equity share capital of its subsidiary, ZIMTAS PTY LTD. This investment is part of an approved total investment of up to Rs. 2 crores. The amount invested is equivalent to AUD 1,35,000. Following this investment, Zim Laboratories Ltd now holds 99.96% of the total share capital of ZIMTAS PTY LTD. This move strengthens the company's control over its subsidiary. The company had previously disclosed intentions for this investment on May 13, 2024, and July 2, 2024.

notes.subject: Dhabriya Polywood Ltd - 538715 - Intimation Under Regulation 30 Of SEBI (Listing Obligations And Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015 (The "Listing Regulation') - Purchase Of Industrial Property.
notes.ai_summary: Dhabriya Polywood Ltd has purchased an industrial property, including land and a building, for a total consideration of ₹22.46 crore. The property, measuring 2436 sq. meters, is located at Plot No. B-10(A,D,D1)A, Malviya Nagar Industrial Area, Jaipur - 302017, and is situated opposite the company's existing factory premises and registered office. This acquisition is intended to support the company's future expansion plans, including capacity enhancement for new and existing product lines. The purchase has been funded through internal accruals and partial bank funding. This intimation is made pursuant to Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.
